description: The state of being aware and awake to existence. Consciousness encompasses the light of awareness, the field in which all experience arises, the witness of all phenomena, the mystery of knowing that we know.
rationale: The word 'shalemi' flows from soft 'sha' through light 'le' to bright 'mi', using a fricative digraph. This three-syllable journey captures consciousness as gentle awareness illuminating into clear knowing.
